Taiwanese-style braise; soy-sauce based (wheat) — not GF unless tamari confirmed.

Made with handmade tofu 'cheese'; gluten-free and dairy-free.

items.ja: 深煎りアイスコーヒー
オリジナルカレー（夕食）

items.ja: 朝食（パン・シリアル・オートミール・スープ）
items.note: Includes bread and cereal — not gluten-free; bring your own GF breakfast.
Fish-and-pork double soup finished with soy-sauce tare (wheat soy sauce). Rice-noodle swap possible but broth/tare + shared boiling water are NOT gluten-free. Not celiac-safe.

Light fish-and-pork double soup with salt tare; tare/broth still assumed to contain wheat soy sauce. This is the bowl a Tabelog reviewer swapped to the 米粉麺 rice noodle — reduced-gluten only, boiled in shared water, not celiac-safe.
Deluxe version of the salt ramen with additional toppings; same broth/tare gluten risk.

items.ja: 米粉麺（グルテンフリー麺）への変更
items.note: Optional swap of the whole-wheat noodle for a rice noodle. Despite the 'gluten-free noodle' name, it is boiled in shared wheat-noodle water and served in wheat-soy broth/tare — NOT celiac-safe and not flagged gf.
